content:
```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant CLI participant PM as PackageManager participant WM as WorkspaceManager participant FS as FileSystem participant Reg as RegistryClient participant LF as Lockfile CLI->>PM: install_with_options(frozen) PM->>WM: WorkspaceMode::detect(root) Note over WM: Probes nx.json → jet-workspace.yaml
→ package.json.workspaces
→ pnpm-workspace.yaml WM-->>PM: WorkspaceMode::Jet(manager) PM->>WM: topological_order() WM-->>PM: ["pkg-a", "pkg-b", "apps/web"] loop each package in topological order PM->>PM: read package.json deps loop each dep PM->>WM: is_workspace_protocol(spec) alt spec starts with workspace: WM-->>PM: true PM->>WM: get_package(dep_name) WM-->>PM: WorkspacePackage { path } PM->>WM: resolve_workspace_protocol(spec, dep_name) WM-->>PM: resolved_version PM->>FS: create_relative_symlink(node_modules/dep → ../../pkg/path) PM->>LF: insert(workspace=true, localPath, version) else external dep WM-->>PM: false PM->>Reg: resolve(name, version_range) Reg-->>PM: ResolvedPackage PM->>FS: download + hardlink to node_modules PM->>LF: insert(workspace=false, tarball, shasum) end end end PM->>LF: write(jet-lock.yaml) ```
